title: Buttondown vs HubSpot (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Buttondown vs HubSpot: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Buttondown and HubSpot comes down to your specific use case. Buttondown is built for developers and technical writers who prefer markdown, while HubSpot targets businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

comparison_table.tool_a: Developers And Technical Writers Who Prefer Markdown
comparison_table.tool_b: Businesses That Want Email And Crm In One Platform

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on developers and technical writers who prefer markdown
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on businesses that want email and CRM in one platform

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Buttondown wins for developers and technical writers who prefer markdown, while HubSpot is stronger for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Buttondown or HubSpot?
faq.a: Buttondown starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from HubSpot to Buttondown?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
